_comment: Species: Dragon Ape (龙猿) from I Shall Seal the Heavens. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Dragon Ape

canonical.appearance: Bipedal ape 6 m tall, scales of dragon, fists of dragon-strength, horns on head
canonical.size: 6 m adult, 15000 jin; ancient 20 m, 200000 jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex predator; combines ape strength with dragon durability
canonical.relationships: Hybrid bloodline; rival of giant savage ape
canonical.bloodline: Dragon-Ape hybrid lineage; dragon + ape bloodline
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: dragon_ape — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
